loading..

Report a Bug/Glitch




About Baseball Bros

Baseball Bros is a simple, fast-paced baseball game that's easy to learn and has lots of crazy hijinks! With online multiplayer gameplay, franchise mode, fun pitching, and so much more!

Controls: Use either the arrow keys or WASD to control your bro. Space bar will throw a the ball, dive, slide, or change directions when you're running the bases.

Be sure to follow us on social media for the latest updates and info!


Changelog (10/30/2025)

Roster Changes and Bug fixes.

Fixed glitch where franchise crashed at week 18.

Fixed glitch where unlocks were not being saved.

Fixed another glitch where the game ends to early if the home team scores on their last at bat while still losing.

Made cpu players better at catching fly balls. Should make it more difficult in 1p games.

Updated theme song.

Fixed more innings glitches.

Fixed glitch where home team wouldn't get their fair at bat in extra innings.

Improved virtual controller on iPads and pnones.

FAQ

Why isn't the game loading?

You should check your internet connection and make sure our site isn't blocked. Also, disable all ad blockers.

How do I play?

Use your arrow keys and space bar! The rest is easy- pick your play and go!

Which browser should I use?

You should use Chrome. It is the only browser guaranteed to work. Baseball Bros has also been tested to work on Firefox and Safari, but not guaranteed.

Are there more Bros games?

Yes! Check out Football Bros, href="https://basketbros.io">Basket Bros, Soccer Bros and Wrestle Bros. Also be sure to check out Web games at FreeGames.io

Do you have a favorite team?

Yes, but we're not saying which one. Drop us an e-mail if you think you know.

I'm blocked, where else can i play?

Check here, these links work for all the bros games: Baseball Bros Unblocked
